Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 127ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
59ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 3ms Show Info + 
  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

Info 

  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 55ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY",
        "THB"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 200,
      "body": {
        "code": 200,
        "data": {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "balances": {
            "CNY": -8661.396544,
            "THB": 0
          }
        },
        "message": "Success"
      }
    }

Info 

  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY",
        "THB"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 200,
      "body": {
        "code": 200,
        "data": {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "balances": {
            "CNY": -8661.396544,
            "THB": 0
          }

        "message": "Success"

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 16ms
field value

currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY",
        "THB"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 400,
      "body": {
        "error": [
          {
            "key": "platform_username",
            "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
          }
        ],
        "message": "Parameter error",
        "code": 400,
        "message_code": 11028
      }
    }

Show Info + 
  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "USD",
        "MYR",
        "INVALID"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 400,
      "body": {
        "error": [
          {
            "key": "currencies.1",
            "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
          },
          {
            "key": "currencies.2",
            "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update < 1ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates

Scenario:
Successful wager notification
< 1ms 2

When APISYS notifies wager update with: < 1ms 

{
  "notification_type": "typeA",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "IMSPORT",
      "game_key": "IMSPORT",
      "wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-3",
      "origin_wager_no": "0001-20250117140015-188011927396-1",
      "ticket_no": "ticketno_123",
      "platform_username": "member01",
      "type": 3,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": 1720694402,
      "settlement_time": 1720698600,
      "is_system_reward": true
    },
    {
      "game_type": "CRASH",
      "game_key": "CRASH_V2",
      "wager_no": "0002-20250117140015-188011927398-1",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": null,
      "platform_username": "member02",
      "type": 1,
      "status": 2,
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": 5.1,
      "payment_amount": 5.1,
      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": 1720694403,
      "settlement_time": null,
      "is_system_reward": false
    }
  ]
}
 

Then(/^APISYS notifies wager update with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel wager API
So that I can refund a previously paid wager

Scenario:
Cancel wager refunds a prepared paid wager
16ms 2 3 2

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

Info 

  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 16ms Show Info + 
  API:
    GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
  Request:
    {
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currencies": [
        "CNY"
      ]
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 200,
      "body": {
        "code": 200,
        "data": {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "balances": {
            "CNY": -8661.396544
          }
        },
        "message": "Success"
      }
    }

So that I can verify paid wager cancellation refund flow end to end

Request payment 30 then cancel wager refunds the same 30

Then the AMO010 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo010_reference_id" < 1ms 

Then(/^I store the response field "([^"]*)" as "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, arg2, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 50 < 1ms

field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 50
session_id <session_id>

Then the AMO010 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id <amo010_reference_id>
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged < 1ms

session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
  API:
    POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
  Request:
    {
      "transfer_no": "4bfce34a-f1a6-4427-a9dd-c6b4a85378c3",
      "game_type": "",
      "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
      "currency": "CNY",
      "amount": "1.1234567",
      "session_id": "0c7f07f5-8efe-4319-9535-46e4fb4a28dd"
    }
  Response:
    {
      "status": 400,
      "body": {
        "error": [
          {
            "key": "amount",
            "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
          }
        ],
        "message": "Parameter error",
        "code": 400,
        "message_code": 11028
      }
    }

I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

When APISYS requests transfer out with: < 1ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id> 

Then(/^APISYS requests transfer out with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO011 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 < 1ms

  callback(null, 'pending');

field value

status 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel transfer API
So that I can reverse a previous transfer ledger

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer in and is idempotent
< 1ms 1 6 2

  platform_username:
    supermerchant1user

    supermerchant1user

transfer_no <transfer_no>
currency <currency>
amount 25

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

});

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer out all integer balance < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify full integer-balance withdrawal behavior end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in 120.5 then transfer out without amount deducts 120 and leaves 0.5
< 1ms 8 3

I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
